knownIssues.scope: Vendor lookup fields on related generated data lists can be configured with selected display fields and valid target metadata, but Add/Edit lookup picker queries may still return zero rows for the generated Vendors target list.
mustStillValidate: lookup display field resolves to the target list
Text0 is not used as lookup display field when target uses native Title
default target-list view includes visible display fields
related sample rows use seeded parent ListDataID values
knownIssues.nextStep: Ask product team which generated-list metadata controls lookup picker query materialization for package-generated target lists.
